display.purpose: Page title only. Appears exactly once per route.

title.purpose: Panel section headers (Sessions, Stack, Skills, etc.).

body.purpose: Transcript dialog and panel readable content.

meta.purpose: Tool calls, result previews, run history.

shadows.name: booth-spotlight
shadows.purpose: The single shadow in the system. Overlays only: search modal, AgentDetail drawer, session dropdown.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (color, opacity, transform). Never bounce, never elastic.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Button hover, row hover, chip hover, focus transitions.

motion.name: pulse-live
motion.purpose: The only allowed continuous animation. Lives on the Live cue dot when a session is busy.

components.name: Panel
components.description: The dashboard's macro unit. A bordered region of the stage with a section header.
components.html:
Sessions(3)
…rows…
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #0a0a0a; color: #e5e5e5; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; } .ds-panel-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #e5e5e5; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-panel-icon { display: inline-flex; color: #e5e5e5; } .ds-panel-count { color: #737373; font-weight: 400; }

components.name: Row
components.description: Atomic line of data inside a panel: one session, skill, MCP, event.
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 4px; background: transparent; color: #d4d4d4; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); text-align: left; } .ds-row:hover { background: #171717; } .ds-row:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #404040; outline-offset: -1px; } .ds-row-glyph { color: #10b981; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-row-label { flex: 1; min-width: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-row-chip { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; background: #171717; color: #a3a3a3; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 6px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-row-time { font-size: 10px; color: #737373; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Chip (cue)
components.description: Status-bearing pill: skill, SDK, stdio, http, sse. Cue color carries the meaning.
components.css: .ds-chip-cue { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 6px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chip-cue--direct { background: rgba(192, 132, 252, 0.15); color: #d8b4fe; } .ds-chip-cue--sdk { background: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.15); color: #93c5fd; } .ds-chip-cue--live { background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.15); color: #fcd34d; }

components.name: Button (primary)
components.description: The Run / Save affordance. One of two button variants; if a third feels needed the affordance is wrong, not the button.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #171717; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #262626; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #525252; outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #404040; }

components.name: Button (ghost)
components.description: Cancel / Dismiss. No fill, brightens on hover. The recessive companion to Primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #737373; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #e5e5e5; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #404040; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Input (text)
components.description: Filter, search, skill args. A single shape; never a second variant.
components.css: .ds-input-text { background: #0a0a0a; color: #e5e5e5; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 8px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input-text::placeholder { color: #525252; } .ds-input-text:focus { outline: none; border-color: #525252; } .ds-input-text:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #404040; outline-offset: -1px; }

components.name: Transcript line: user prompt
components.description: The brightest pixel in the room. User prompt with the Cue Direct '>' glyph and bold ink text.
components.html: >Use the stack-doctor agent to check my install
components.css: .ds-tx-user { display: flex; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 0; color: #ffffff; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; min-width: 0; } .ds-tx-user-glyph { color: #c084fc; flex-shrink: 0; user-select: none; } .ds-tx-user-text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }

components.name: Transcript line: tool call
components.description: PostToolUse rendering. Bullet + tool name + args, with a brighter '⎿ result' continuation below.
components.html:
●Bash(npm install)
⎿added 234 packages in 23s
components.css: .ds-tx-tool { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; padding: 2px 0; } .ds-tx-tool-head { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: baseline; } .ds-tx-tool-glyph { flex-shrink: 0; user-select: none; } .ds-tx-tool-head .ds-tx-tool-glyph { color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.7); } .ds-tx-tool-name { color: #a3a3a3; } .ds-tx-tool-args { color: #737373; flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tx-tool-result { display: flex; gap: 8px; color: #d4d4d4; font-size: 12px; } .ds-tx-tool-result .ds-tx-tool-glyph { color: #525252; }

components.name: Transcript: sub-agent bucket
components.description: Signature component. Collapsed by default: Agent + description + model on one line, '⎿ Done · duration' below, click expands children indented under a left rule.
components.html:
●Agent(Inspect auth module for issues)Haiku 4.5
⎿Done · 1m 41s(click to expand)
components.css: .ds-tx-agent { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; padding: 4px 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); border-radius: 4px; } .ds-tx-agent:hover { background: rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.4); } .ds-tx-agent-head { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: baseline; } .ds-tx-agent-glyph { flex-shrink: 0; user-select: none; color: #c084fc; } .ds-tx-agent-label { color: #e5e5e5; font-weight: 600; } .ds-tx-agent-desc { color: #737373; flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tx-agent-model { color: #a3a3a3; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tx-agent-result { display: flex; gap: 8px; font-size: 11px; color: #737373; align-items: baseline; } .ds-tx-agent-result .ds-tx-agent-glyph { color: #525252; } .ds-tx-agent-done { color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-tx-agent-hint { color: #525252; font-size: 10px; margin-left: 8px; }

components.name: Transcript: AskUserQuestion
components.description: Pause-and-decide moment. Amber '?' glyph + question, '↳' below with the answer in ink-quiet.
components.html:
?Confirm the register: this surface is the dashboard. Match?
↳Product, design serves the tool
components.css: .ds-tx-ask { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #737373; padding: 2px 0; } .ds-tx-ask-q { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: baseline; } .ds-tx-ask-q-glyph { color: #fbbf24; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; user-select: none; } .ds-tx-ask-a { display: flex; gap: 8px; padding-left: 16px; align-items: baseline; } .ds-tx-ask-a-glyph { color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.6); flex-shrink: 0; user-select: none; } .ds-tx-ask-a > span:last-child { color: #d4d4d4; flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }

narrative.overview:
The dashboard is the calm room behind a live performance. The operator watches, never performs. The booth is dim so the cues stand out. Information is plentiful but it does not shout; the eye rests until something asks for attention, and then it gets exactly the attention it needs.

This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS admin templates, crypto-hacker neon, Notion-style consumer warmth, and AI-product purple-gradient heroes. When a tile, chip, or panel starts edging toward any of those, rewrite it, do not tune it.

Density is the trade. Following Linear and Raycast more than Datadog: many things on screen, every pixel earned, no decorative chrome between user and data. Monochrome by default; semantic color appears only where it carries meaning.
keyCharacteristics: Dark surface, near-black, slightly cool. Light cards on dark booth, never the inverse.
Monospace as the body voice; system sans only for the page title.
Five cue colors, each tied to one meaning (live, direct, wrap, sdk, fail). Never decorative.
Flat by default; one ambient shadow reserved for overlays.
No gradients anywhere. No glass. No bouncy motion. No oversized rounded corners.

rules.name: The Rationed Color Rule
rules.body: Cue colors are reserved for state, never for character. There are exactly five cue meanings; everything else is monochrome.

rules.name: The Brightest Pixel Rule
rules.body: Only the user's prompt text is rendered in true white. Assistant text drops one step. Tool calls drop two. The user always wins the contrast contest.

rules.name: The No-Decorative-Tint Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds use only Stage, Panel Tint, and panel-raised. No tinted backgrounds in cue colors. State changes are conveyed by glyph color and small chip pills, not by surface color.

rules.name: The Monospace Voice Rule
rules.body: Everything operational is monospace. System sans is reserved for the page title.

rules.name: The Tabular Numerals Rule
rules.body: All numeric content must align across rows. Numbers that don't align make the operator's eye work, which violates 'calm.'

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Panels at rest carry no shadow. Hover introduces a half-step background lift, never a shadow.

rules.name: The Shadow-Means-Lifted Rule
rules.body: Any element with a shadow is, definitionally, above the page. If a shadow appears on something in-page, that is a category error.

dos: Do use the cue color vocabulary only for state, never for decoration.
Do make the user's prompt line the brightest pixel in the room.
Do keep panels flat. Hover is a half-step tonal lift, never a shadow.
Do use monospace for every operational text. System sans only for the page title.
Do keep rows tight (4px padding, 12px line-height).
Do use Lucide icons at 14px in panel headers, 11px inside rows.
Do show time on hover only via the title attribute.
Do put the model name right-aligned on Agent rows.
Do keep the AskUserQuestion '?' in Cue Live, semibold.
donts: Don't introduce purple-to-pink gradients, glowing borders, glassmorphism, or hero metric templates.
Don't drift into generic SaaS admin shell: identical KPI cards, four-column dashboards, heavy sidebars.
Don't ship the crypto/hacker neon aesthetic.
Don't drift toward Notion-style consumer warmth.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use background-clip text with a gradient.
Don't add shadows to non-overlay components.
Don't introduce a third button variant beyond Primary and Ghost.
Don't decorate panels with cue colors.
Don't add a third typography family.
